Snacks Between Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to snack between meals. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
204 F0800H_STF_BED_TIME_CD F0800H_STF_BED_TIME_CD F0800H Staff Assessment: Bed Time Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to stay up past eight p.m. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
